metadata.description: Explore manuscript structure (NHB2026, ACM2026) to understand methodology documentation for Likert phrases, thematic probes, and supplementary materials

summary: Successfully explored manuscript structure across 4 versions (NHB2026, ACM2026, general_manuscript, arxiv) and identified complete methodology documentation and supplementary materials. All versions document Likert-style anchor statements, thematic probes, and public probes comprehensively.

annotation.content: Manuscript exploration complete. Found 4 different manuscript versions with consistent methodology sections but slight variations in supplementary documentation.
